news_items.headline: Bobby Witt Jr. injury update: Royals shortstop has Grade 1 MCL strain

news_items.headline: Blanco, McCullers take steps toward return
news_items.summary: Ronel Blanco and Lance McCullers Jr. took steps toward rejoining the Astros’ pitching staff on Friday. Blanco made his first rehab start in a Florida Complex League game in West Palm Beach, while McCullers threw a live batting practice session at Daikin Park. Blanco struck out five while allowing one hit and one walk over […]
